hero.title: Stefano Icardi
hero.subtitle: Clinical Psychologist
hero.description: I provide psychological support and individual therapy for adults. My approach is relational, integrated, and personalized.
hero.trustSignal: Registered with the Order of Psychologists of Lombardy, Register A (No. 22963)

whyPsychologist.title: Why See a Psychologist?
whyPsychologist.paragraph1: In a society where everything moves quickly, where we struggle to find time to reflect on what is happening to us, we are increasingly connected, but without real connections.
whyPsychologist.paragraph2: A psychologist can help create a space for self-reflection, a protected place where you can explore your emotions, thoughts, and behaviors without judgment.
whyPsychologist.paragraph3: A psychological journey can help you better understand yourself, develop new strategies for dealing with difficulties, and improve the quality of your relationships.

practicalInfo.title: Practical Information
practicalInfo.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start a journey

whenToSeek.title: When to Seek Help
whenToSeek.description: Suffering is a very subjective matter. What may be painful for us might seem superficial to others, but this does not invalidate it. Being aware of what you feel inside is the first step.

duration.title: Duration and Process
duration.description: Each session lasts approximately 50 minutes. The journey generally spans from a few months to a year, based on the goals we agree upon together.

frequency.title: Session Frequency
frequency.description: The frequency is typically weekly or biweekly. It is agreed upon together based on personal needs and the goals of the journey.

journey.title: The Therapeutic Journey
journey.paragraph1: The therapeutic journey focuses on the individual with the aim of supporting them in processing critical moments in life that create distress and that they feel unable to manage independently.
journey.paragraph2: In the process, we focus on the individual and how they face different situations (relationships, work, and daily life), with particular attention to relational dynamics, while enhancing and strengthening the resources they already possess.
journey.paragraph3: My approach is based on the therapeutic relationship as the main tool for change, in a context of empathetic and non-judgmental listening.

interventionAreas.title: Areas of Intervention
interventionAreas.subtitle: Areas where I can offer you support
interventionAreas.area8: Insecurities and blocks in life changes
